final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing marketing poster for cross-border e-commerce promotion.

Style/medium: bold graphic poster design with layered typography and dynamic composition, contemporary editorial advertising aesthetic
Composition: 16:9 landscape format, complex multi-layered layout with overlapping text elements and foreground product placement
Subject: prominent artistic display typography with stacked font layers, partially obscured by product or central subject creating depth
Scene/backdrop: promotional e-commerce context with structured visual hierarchy, organized complexity without clutter
Lighting/mood: clean studio lighting with subtle shadows to enhance depth between layers, energetic and commercial atmosphere
Color palette: high-contrast brand colors with clear visual hierarchy, accent colors highlighting key promotional messages
Constraints: text layers must remain legible despite overlap; product placement must enhance not distract from promotional message; 16:9 aspect ratio mandatory
Avoid: cluttered chaos, illegible text, generic stock photo aesthetic, watermark, 8K stuffer words
